messages.content:
create a table, 1. L4 microkernel family (1993)
- Category: Microkernel
- Operating Systems: L4/Linux, L4Darwin, and others
- Outline: A family of second-generation microkernels designed to be used in a variety of systems.
- Website: https://os.inf.tu-dresden.de/L4/
- Source Code: https://github.com/l4re/l4re
- Coding Language: C, C++, and Assembly
- Discontinued / Active: Active

2. MINIX microkernel (1987)
- Category: Microkernel
- Operating System: MINIX
- Outline: A Unix-like microkernel-based operating system that served as the inspiration for the development of Linux.
- Website: https://www.minix3.org
- Source Code: https://github.com/Stichting-MINIX-Research-Foundation/minix
- Coding Language: C
- Discontinued / Active: Active

3. QNX microkernel (1982)
- Category: Microkernel
- Operating System: QNX
- Outline: A commercial Unix-like real-time operating system that supports multitasking and is designed for embedded systems.
- Website: http://www.qnx.com
- Source Code: Proprietary
- Coding Language: C
- Discontinued / Active: Active

4. GNU Hurd microkernel (1990)
- Category: Microkernel
- Operating System: GNU Hurd
- Outline: A set of server processes that interoperate with the Mach microkernel to provide an operating system.
- Website: https://www.gnu.org/software/hurd/hurd.html
- Source Code: https://git.savannah.gnu.org/git/hurd/hurd.git
- Coding Language: C
- Discontinued / Active: Active

5. seL4 microkernel (2009)
- Category: Microkernel
- Operating System: seL4
- Outline: A formally verified microkernel that provides strong isolation and security guarantees.
- Website: https://sel4.systems
- Source Code: https://github.com/seL4/seL4
- Coding Language: C
- Discontinued / Active: Active

6. Fiasco.OC microkernel (2008)
- Category: Microkernel
- Operating System: L4Re
- Outline: A member of the L4 microkernel family designed for performance and flexibility.
- Website: https://os.inf.tu-dresden.de/fiasco/
- Source Code: https://github.com/kernels/foc
- Coding Language: C++
- Discontinued / Active: Active
